author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Added 8 missing elementwise GPU kernels: div, exp, log, sqrt, pow, abs, sigmoid, tanh. Modified exactly 3 files: gpu_dispatch.rs (trait methods with default impls), kernels.rs (PTX constants + Rust wrappers with CPU fallbacks + non-cuda stubs), backend_impl.rs (CudaBackendImpl trait impls). All 616 ferrotorch-core tests pass, cargo check clean.
